scenarios.docBefore:
# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers
scenarios.docAfter:

# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals

## Q1 Goals: Improving Performance
• Increase CPU speed by 30% • Optimize memory usage by 25% • Implement caching to reduce database queries
## Q2 Goals: New Features
• Develop a machine learning-powered recommendation engine to suggest new features based on user behavior
